title: More Roman Numerals [MRN]
description: This mod adds more roman numerals for enchantments and potions.
body:
# Information

This lightweight client-side mod adds Roman numerals for enchantments and potions, up to level 255.

This mod has a [sister mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-roman-numerals/) that removes the Roman numerals and replaces them with Arabic ones.

# Resource Pack Version


**Note**: The resource pack version is **not**, but as there already exists a good alternative, why bother?

+ [Large Roman Numerals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/large-roman-numerals) by [Twixxi](https://modrinth.com/user/Twixxi).
